title: How bad of a captain was Commander Ikari
display_title: How bad of a captain was Commander Ikari
wikitext:
[]: How bad of a captain was Commander Ikari?             Quote Post by angelofgendo » Tue Nov 14, 2023 7:07 pm This is a question about the AWinters quote in Blockio's signature ( post/920732/NERV-military-ranks/#p920617 ): AWinters wrote: I can see why he hired Misato to do the actual commanding. He tried it once and did an appalling job.

[]: Re: How bad of a captain was Commander Ikari?             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Wed Nov 15, 2023 10:00 am The feeling that Gendo was a terrible commander is based upon what we see of his battle tactics. Misato always sent all three Evas in at once. Gendo sent them in one at a time and they were defeated one at a time. Misato knew Shinji, Rei and Asuka were at their best working together.

[]: Re: How bad of a captain was Commander Ikari?             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Wed Nov 15, 2023 6:11 pm We have this general idea of Gendo as a master planner, and he had at least some involvement in Seele's overall world domination efforts. I can see how he'd be talented at administration and such, but that doesn't mean he's good as a military commander.

[]: Re: How bad of a captain was Commander Ikari?             Quote Post by shinryujimikihiko » Fri Nov 17, 2023 5:10 am Everything I've seen of Gendo Ikari's skills indicates that he is a cunning and Machiavellian schemer but not a good tactician. The old "Evil Ambassador Gendo" meme is on the money: Gendo is a great schemer but a poor warlord.

[]: Re: How bad of a captain was Commander Ikari?             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Fri Nov 17, 2023 11:03 am Gonna agree with everyone saying that while he’s bizarrely good at personal and social manipulations he’s not quite a military man. He’s more of a Survivor player than a Fire Emblem player.

[]: Re: How bad of a captain was Commander Ikari?             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Tue Nov 21, 2023 6:35 am I honestly believe that he's the right person for the job anyway. What he did to the Jet Alone, for example... It was such an easy thing for him to do. He eliminated the competition in a blink, all while making the EVA look better in comparison. He also knows how to deal with Seele and get funds. Heck, we was directly antagonizing Seele and making them pay for his stuff at the same time. Not only that, but he's great at improvising. The way he disposed of the Spear of Longinus was really smart. It was obvious that he was just messing around with Seele. Still, he had a great alibi... Last but not least, he knows how to select the right people to work with him and also, of course, manipulate them. No one person is good at everything. A good leader knows how to bring the best professionals closer. He's the commander , not the cheif of operations. Gendo chose Misato because he knew she was better than anyone for that particular job. But, at the end of the day, he's still her boss.

[]: Re: How bad of a captain was Commander Ikari?             Quote Post by shinryujimikihiko » Sun Nov 26, 2023 5:21 am BernardoCairo wrote: A good leader knows how to bring the best professionals closer. He's the commander , not the cheif of operations. Gendo chose Misato because he knew she was better than anyone for that particular job. But, at the end of the day, he's still her boss.
